notes: Top-level shell. index.html references ./manifest.json, ./styles/app.css, ./src/app.js — all relative. app.js boot order: loadScenarios -> initFirebase -> signInAnonymously -> registerServiceWorker -> router. config.js holds Firebase + VAPID placeholders. README documents the four canonical steps (create Firebase project, paste config, push to GitHub, enable Pages) plus auxiliary steps (Firestore rules paste, VAPID keys, iOS Add-to-Home-Screen).
